summary: Crisp soundboard capture of a high‑energy 1984 Meadowlands set with a soaring Help > Slipknot! > Franklin’s and fiery Terrapin, though Jerry’s vocals wobble later.
review: The recording is a clean soundboard source that lets listeners hear the band’s intense second‑set flow – from an expansive Help‑on‑the‑Way > Slipknot! > Franklin’s to a peak Terrapin Station and a wild Other One/Truckin' jam. While most fans praise Jerry’s guitar work and the overall fire of the performance, a few note vocal strain and occasional distortion that temper the otherwise excellent show.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently strong praise for musical performance and mostly favorable comments about a crisp soundboard recording outweigh the few criticisms of vocal strain and occasional distortion.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, well‑balanced board capture praised as 'crispy' and 'great sound quality'; a couple of reviewers note the mix can be very loud/distorted in places but no major dropouts.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
Goin' Down the Road Feeling Bad
show_quality.setlist_flow: A high‑energy second set with tight transitions, especially the Help‑Slipknot‑Franklin’s sequence and a jam‑heavy Other One > Truckin' segment; post‑space jams flow into Stella Blue and finish strong despite some vocal wobble.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for powerful guitar work and memorable moments (Help, Slipknot!, Terrapin), but noted to have strained vocals later in the set.
band_member_comments.Phil: Highlighted for dominating the Slipknot! jam alongside Jerry and contributing heavily throughout the second set.
band_member_comments.Bob: Mentioned for a slip‑up on the first verse of The Other One and the usual spot in Truckin', though his whistle saved the transition.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent (keyboards) receives specific kudos on Stella Blue; no other keyboard comments noted.
